nasb.text: the woven garments as well, and the holy garments for Aaron the priest, and the garments of his sons, with which to carry on their priesthood;

esv.text: and the finely worked garments, the holy garments for Aaron the priest and the garments of his sons, for their service as priests,

cnv.text: 彩衣和亞倫祭司的聖衣，以及他兒子們供祭司職分的衣服、

ccb.text: 还有精工制做的礼服，即亚伦祭司的圣衣及其众子供祭司之职时穿的礼服，
